posts.title: A first story from my adventures in trying to stop AI from unaliving us all
There's a bunch of reasons to speak up if you're concerned about AI. First and foremost is that you're one of the people who's going to be harmed.
Happy 250th, America. The world needs more of the ideals America was founded on.
AIs are grown, not crafted. Lots of people ask "well don't the AI companies design the AIs to be helpful?" No. Nobody designs AI.
A lotta folk out their imagine superintelligences getting hung up on obstacles that wouldn't even stop *them*.
